description: Owner-facing control panel for the Type-B cloud agent: sliders + personality history. Normative human-readable source: DASHBOARD_API_CONTRACT.md (2026-07-18). Sibling in spirit to account-server's windy.fleet.v1.

auth.ownership: agent resolved by claims.windy_identity_id (fallback sub) == agent_credentials.owner_windy_id; no agent id in the URL

sliders.storage: only non-default values are stored; missing key = default midwife behavior

application.others: static tone-directive block appended to the midwife system prompt (thresholds >7 / <3, mirroring windy-agent personality/engine.py)

endpoints.returns: {contract, kind:'cloud', capabilities[], agent{agent_matrix_id, agent_name, passport_number, hatched_at, status:'alive'|'sleeping'|'unknown', last_event_at, replies_sent}, personality{sliders, preset}}
{sliders:{<name>:int}} — all supported sliders, defaults filled in
{history:[{id, key, soul_id, old_value, new_value, changed_by, created_at}]}

endpoints.path: anything else from the gateway surface

conventions: JSON, snake_case, errors {error:string} (+capability on 501, +hint where useful). Liveness is data (agent.status), never an error — sliders read/write even while the runner sleeps.
